preflight.name: Install desktop release prerequisites

build.name: Verify desktop release workspace
build.run:
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$PSNativeCommandUseErrorActionPreference = $true
pnpm install:shared-sdk
pnpm test:desktop:contracts
pnpm --filter @sdkwork/canvas-pc-shell test
pnpm --filter @sdkwork/canvas-pc-desktop test
pnpm test:desktop:rust
pnpm typecheck
pnpm build

package.name: Build selected desktop package

sign.name: Sign artifacts placeholder
sign.run: Write-Host "Signing policy is configured by release environment for $env:SDKWORK_PACKAGE_ID"

sbom.name: SBOM placeholder
sbom.run: Write-Host "SBOM generation is not required for $env:SDKWORK_PACKAGE_ID"

validate.name: Validate selected desktop package
